events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes a commercial HVAC-R project at rough-complete stage. The observed condition is "line set uninsulated suction" — meaning the suction line of the refrigerant line set is not insulated. This is a defect because suction lines must be insulated to prevent condensation and energy loss, per manufacturer installation manuals and IMC M1401. This is non-compliant and installed-defective. Decision should be fail since it's non-compliant.
